actions.name: CsvReader
actions.description: CSVファイルから地物を読み取る

parameterI18n.title: CsvReader Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure how CSV and TSV files are processed and read

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

encoding.title: Character Encoding
encoding.description:
Character encoding for the CSV/TSV file. If not specified, defaults to UTF-8.

Supported encodings include: - **UTF-8** - Unicode UTF-8 (default) - **Shift-JIS** - Japanese encoding - **EUC-JP** - Japanese encoding - **Windows Code Pages** - Windows-1250 through Windows-1258 - **ISO-8859 family** - ISO-8859-1 through ISO-8859-16

All encoding labels are case-insensitive.

format.title: File Format
format.description: Choose the delimiter format for the input file

geometry.title: Geometry Configuration
geometry.description: Optional configuration for parsing geometry from CSV columns

headerRows.title: Header Row Count
headerRows.description: Number of consecutive rows that make up the header (default: 1). When 0, no header rows are read and column names are auto-generated as "column1", "column2", etc. When greater than 1, column names are formed by joining non-empty values from each header row with "_".

inline.title: Inline Content
inline.description: Expression that returns the file content as text instead of reading from a file path

offset.title: Header Row Offset
offset.description: Skip this many rows from the beginning to find the header row (0 = first row is header)

epsg.title: EPSG Code
epsg.description: Coordinate Reference System code (e.g., 4326 for WGS84)

parameterI18n.title: CsvWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to CSV/TSV files.

geometry.title: Geometry Configuration
geometry.description: Optional configuration for exporting geometry to CSV columns

output.description: Output path or expression for the CSV/TSV file to create

actions.name: CzmlReader
actions.description: CZML（Cesium言語）ファイルから3D視覚化用の地理的特徴を読み取ります。時系列データや時間動的プロパティに対応

parameterI18n.title: CzmlReader Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for reading CZML files as geographic features.

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

force2d.title: Force 2D
force2d.description: If true, forces all geometries to be 2D (ignoring Z values)

inline.title: Inline Content
inline.description: Expression that returns the file content as text instead of reading from a file path

skipDocumentPacket.title: Skip Document Packet
skipDocumentPacket.description: If true, skips the document packet (first packet with version/clock info)

timeSampling.title: Time Sampling Strategy
timeSampling.description: How to handle time-dynamic properties in CZML packets. Defaults to "preserveRaw" for lossless round-trip with CzmlWriter.

allSamples.description: Extract all time-tagged samples as separate features, each with a `czml.timestamp` and `czml.timeOffset` attribute. Useful when you need per-sample processing in downstream actions.

firstSampleOnly.description: Keep the first sample only (static geometry). Use this for workflows that don't need timeseries data.

preserveRaw.description: Embed the full timeseries in one feature per entity. The feature geometry uses the first sample, `czml.timeseries` holds all position samples as a JSON array, and all other CZML packet properties (point, path, orientation, ellipsoid, etc.) are preserved as `czml.<key>` attributes for faithful round-trip through CzmlWriter.

actions.name: CzmlWriter
actions.description: 地物をCZMLファイルとしてエクスポートします。時間動的エンティティや時系列位置データに対応

parameterI18n.title: CzmlWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description:
Configuration for writing geographic features to CZML files. Supports both static entities and time-dynamic entities with interpolated position samples.

## Timeseries Configuration

To create time-animated entities in Cesium, configure at least the first two parameters below; configure `epoch` only when using numeric time offsets: 1. `timeField` - Attribute containing time values 2. `groupTimeseriesBy` - Attribute to group features into entities 3. `epoch` (optional) - Base time used when `timeField` contains numeric offsets

### Example with ISO 8601 timestamps: ```yaml - action: CzmlWriter with: output: "vehicles.czml" timeField: "timestamp"           # Contains "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", etc. groupTimeseriesBy: "vehicleId"   # Groups by vehicle ID interpolationAlgorithm: "LAGRANGE" interpolationDegree: 5 ```

### Example with numeric time offsets: ```yaml - action: CzmlWriter with: output: "sensors.czml" timeField: "timeOffset"          # Contains numeric values: 0, 60, 120, etc. groupTimeseriesBy: "sensorId" epoch: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"    # Base time for offsets interpolationAlgorithm: "LINEAR" ```

colorAttribute.title: Color Attribute
colorAttribute.description: Attribute containing a hex color string (e.g., "#ffd8c0") for polygon fill. Used when polygon geometry is auto-converted from the feature geometry.

epoch.title: Epoch
epoch.description:
Reference time (ISO 8601 format) used as the base for numeric time offsets.

**When to use:** - Optional but recommended when `timeField` contains numeric values (e.g., "0", "60", "3600") - Not needed when `timeField` contains ISO 8601 datetime strings

**Format:** ISO 8601 datetime string with timezone - Examples: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", "2024-06-15T09:00:00+09:00"

**Auto-detection:** If omitted and all time values are numeric, automatically defaults to Unix epoch "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z". For custom time ranges, explicitly set this parameter to your desired base time.

**Example:** ```yaml epoch: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"  # Time value "60" means 2024-01-01T00:01:00Z ```

groupBy.title: Group By Attributes
groupBy.description: Attributes used to group features into separate CZML files

groupTimeseriesBy.title: Group Timeseries By
groupTimeseriesBy.description: Attribute used to group features into a single time-dynamic CZML entity. Features with the same value for this attribute are merged into one packet with time-tagged positions.

heightAttribute.title: Height Attribute
heightAttribute.description: Attribute containing a numeric value for polygon extrusion height. When set, polygons are extruded from ground to this height value.

interpolationAlgorithm.title: Interpolation Algorithm
interpolationAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used by Cesium to interpolate between time-tagged samples.

interpolationDegree.title: Interpolation Degree
interpolationDegree.description: Degree of interpolation (1 for LINEAR, 5 typical for LAGRANGE).

opacity.title: Opacity
opacity.description: Alpha value (0–255) for polygon fill color. Default: 180.

output.title: Output File Path
output.description: Path where the CZML file will be written

timeField.title: Time Field
timeField.description:
Attribute containing the timestamp for each feature. Supports two formats: - **ISO 8601 strings**: e.g., "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", "2024-01-01T12:30:45+09:00" - **Numeric values**: Seconds as offset from epoch (e.g., "0", "60", "120.5")

When set together with `groupTimeseriesBy`, features sharing the same group key are combined into a single CZML entity with time-tagged position samples for animation in Cesium.

**Example workflow configuration:** ```yaml - action: CzmlWriter with: output: "output.czml" timeField: "timestamp" groupTimeseriesBy: "vehicleId" epoch: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"  # Optional for numeric times (auto-defaults to Unix epoch) ```

HERMITE.description: Hermite spline interpolation using tangent data.

LAGRANGE.description: Lagrange polynomial interpolation for smooth curves (typical degree 5).

attribute.description: Attribute containing the datetime value to convert

inputFormat.description: Format of the input value (default: auto)

outputAttribute.description: Write result to a different attribute (leave input untouched) Defaults to the same as `attribute`

outputFormat.description: Desired output format (default: auto). Use `auto` to store as typed DateTime value (parser mode). Use other formats to output as string/number (formatter mode).

auto.description: Auto-detect from known formats. Note: Numeric values are always interpreted as Unix seconds. For milliseconds, use the explicit `unix_ms` input format.
Auto: Store as typed DateTime value (preserves the native variant). Use this when you want the datetime as a proper DateTime type rather than a string.

splitLevel.description: Split level for CityGML geometry. - "element": Split by surface elements (RoofSurface, WallSurface, etc.) - default - "polygon": Split down to individual polygons within each element

element.description: Split by GmlGeometry elements (e.g., RoofSurface, WallSurface)

polygon.description: Split down to individual polygons within each element

actions.name: GeometryValidator
actions.description: 地物のジオメトリを検証する

parameterI18n.title: Geometry Validator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure which validation checks to perform on feature geometries

validationTypes.title: Validation Types

actions.name: GeometryValueFilter
actions.description: 値に基づいてジオメトリをフィルタリングする

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

includeNodes.title: Include Nodes
includeNodes.description: If true, includes node hierarchy information from the glTF scene graph in feature attributes

inline.title: Inline Content
inline.description: Expression that returns the file content as text instead of reading from a file path

mergeMeshes.title: Merge Meshes
mergeMeshes.description: If true, combines all meshes from the glTF file into a single output feature

triangulate.title: Triangulate
triangulate.description: If true, converts all primitives to triangles (reserved for future use - currently all primitives are processed as triangles)

actions.name: GltfWriter
actions.description: 地物をGltfファイルに書き出す

parameterI18n.title: GltfWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to GLTF 3D format.

attachTexture.description: Whether to attach texture information to the GLTF model

dracoCompression.description: Apply Draco compression to the geometry

output.description: Output file path. When `schemaKey` is set, treated as a directory and each feature type is written to `<output>/<schemaKeyValue>.glb`; otherwise all features are written to this single file.

schemaKey.description: Features are grouped by this attribute and written to separate files. The key is excluded from output attributes.

groupBy.title: Group By Attributes
groupBy.description: Attributes used to group features - each group gets its own grid origin

keepSquareOnly.title: Keep Square Only
keepSquareOnly.description: If true, only output complete grid squares (discard edge pieces). Default: false

unitSquareSize.title: Unit Square Size
unitSquareSize.description: Side length of each grid cell (in the same units as the geometry coordinates)

actions.name: HTTPCaller
actions.description: HTTP/HTTPSリクエストを実行し、レスポンスデータでフィーチャを強化する

parameterI18n.title: HTTP Caller Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure HTTP/HTTPS requests to enrich features with response data

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Authentication method and credentials for the request

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: Override the Content-Type header for the request

customHeaders.title: Custom Headers
customHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in the request

httpOptions.title: HTTP Options
httpOptions.description: HTTP client behavior settings (SSL, redirects, user agent)

method.title: HTTP Method
method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request

queryParameters.title: Query Parameters
queryParameters.description: URL query parameters to append to the request

rateLimit.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimit.description: Rate limiting configuration to control request frequency

requestBody.title: Request Body
requestBody.description: The body content to send with the request

response.title: Response Configuration
response.description: Configure how response data is stored and processed

retry.title: Retry Configuration
retry.description: Settings for automatic retry on failures

url.title: URL
url.description: The target URL for the HTTP request (supports expressions)

name.title: Field Name
name.description: The name of the form field

value.title: Field Value
value.description: The value of the form field (supports expressions)

name.title: Header Name
name.description: The name of the HTTP header

value.title: Header Value
value.description: The value of the header (supports expressions)

followRedirects.title: Follow Redirects
followRedirects.description: Whether to automatically follow HTTP redirects (default: true)

maxRedirects.title: Max Redirects
maxRedirects.description: Maximum number of redirects to follow (default: 10)

verifySsl.title: Verify SSL
verifySsl.description: Whether to verify SSL/TLS certificates (default: true)

bytesAttribute.title: Bytes Attribute
bytesAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the response body size

durationAttribute.title: Duration Attribute
durationAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store request duration in milliseconds

finalUrlAttribute.title: Final URL Attribute
finalUrlAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the final URL after redirects

retryCountAttribute.title: Retry Count Attribute
retryCountAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the number of retry attempts

trackBytes.title: Track Bytes
trackBytes.description: Whether to track the response body size in bytes (default: false)

trackDuration.title: Track Duration
trackDuration.description: Whether to track the total request duration (default: true)

trackFinalUrl.title: Track Final URL
trackFinalUrl.description: Whether to track the final URL after redirects (default: false)

trackRetryCount.title: Track Retry Count
trackRetryCount.description: Whether to track the number of retry attempts (default: true)

name.title: Parameter Name
name.description: The name of the query parameter

value.title: Parameter Value
value.description: The value of the parameter (supports expressions)

intervalMs.title: Interval
intervalMs.description: Time interval in milliseconds for the rate limit (default: 1000ms)

requests.title: Requests
requests.description: Maximum number of requests allowed within the interval

timing.title: Timing Strategy
timing.description: How to distribute requests within the interval (default: Burst)

autoDetectEncoding.title: Auto Detect Encoding
autoDetectEncoding.description: Automatically detect character encoding from response headers

errorAttribute.title: Error Attribute
errorAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store any error messages (default: "_http_error")

headersAttribute.title: Headers Attribute
headersAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the response headers (default: "_headers")

maxResponseSize.title: Max Response Size
maxResponseSize.description: Maximum response body size in bytes (unlimited if not set)

responseBodyAttribute.title: Response Body Attribute
responseBodyAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the response body (default: "_response_body")

responseEncoding.title: Response Encoding
responseEncoding.description: How to encode the response body (text, base64, or binary)

responseHandling.title: Response Handling
responseHandling.description: How to handle the response data (attribute or file)

statusCodeAttribute.title: Status Code Attribute
statusCodeAttribute.description: Feature attribute name to store the HTTP status code (default: "_http_status_code")

backoffMultiplier.title: Backoff Multiplier
backoffMultiplier.description: Multiplier for exponential backoff between retries (default: 2.0)

honorRetryAfter.title: Honor Retry-After Header
honorRetryAfter.description: Whether to respect the Retry-After header from server responses (default: true)

initialDelayMs.title: Initial Delay
initialDelayMs.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before first retry (default: 100ms)

maxDelayMs.title: Max Delay
maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds between retries (default: 10000ms)

retryOnStatus.title: Retry on Status Codes
retryOnStatus.description: List of HTTP status codes that should trigger a retry (e.g., [429, 503])

connectionTimeout.title: Connection Timeout
connectionTimeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to establish a connection (default: 60)

transferTimeout.title: Transfer Timeout
transferTimeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to complete the entire request (default: 90)

header.title: Header
header.description: Include API key in HTTP header

query.title: Query Parameter
query.description: Include API key in URL query string

binary.title: Binary
binary.description: Store response as raw binary data

burst.title: Burst
burst.description: Allow all requests immediately, then pause until next interval

distributed.title: Distributed
distributed.description: Evenly distribute requests throughout the interval

actions.name: HoleCounter
actions.description: ジオメトリ内の穴の数をカウントし、属性として追加する

parameterI18n.title: Hole Counter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure where to store the count of holes found in polygon geometries

outputAttribute.title: Output Attribute
outputAttribute.description: Name of the attribute where the hole count will be stored as a number

actions.name: HoleExtractor
actions.description: ジオメトリ内の穴を抽出し、属性として追加する

actions.name: HorizontalReprojector
actions.description: 地物のジオメトリを指定された座標系に水平再投影する

parameterI18n.title: Horizontal Reprojector Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure the source and target coordinate systems for geometry reprojection

sourceEpsgCode.title: Source EPSG Code
sourceEpsgCode.description: Source coordinate system EPSG code expression. If not provided, will use the EPSG code from the geometry. This is optional to maintain backward compatibility but recommended to be explicit. Can be a constant value (e.g., "4326") or an expression referencing feature attributes.

targetEpsgCode.title: Target EPSG Code
targetEpsgCode.description: Target coordinate system EPSG code expression for the reprojection. Can be a constant value (e.g., "4326" for WGS84, "2193" for NZTM2000, "3857" for Web Mercator) or an expression referencing feature attributes.

parameterI18n.title: Image Rasterizer Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure how to convert vector geometries to raster images

onOverlap.title: On Overlap
onOverlap.description: Strategy for resolving pixel overlap when multiple polygons cover the same pixel.

saveTo.title: Save To
saveTo.description: Optional path expression to save the generated image. If not provided, uses default cache directory.

sum.description: Saturating-add RGB channels of all overlapping polygons.

parameterI18n.description: Configuration for reading JSON files as features.

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

inline.title: Inline Content

parameterI18n.title: JsonWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to JSON files.

converter.description: Optional converter expression to transform features before writing

parameterI18n.description: Configuration for finding intersection points between line features.

overlaidListsAttrName.description: Name of the attribute to store the overlaid lists. Defaults to "overlaidLists".

parameterI18n.title: ListConcatenator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for concatenating a specific attribute from list elements.

attribute.description: Attribute name to extract from each list element

outputAttributeName.description: Name of the attribute to store the concatenated result

separateCharacter.description: Character(s) to use as separator between concatenated values

parameterI18n.title: ListExploder Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for exploding array attributes into individual features.

sourceAttribute.description: Attribute containing the array to explode (each element becomes a separate feature)

parameterI18n.title: ListIndexer Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for copying attributes from a specific list element to main feature attributes.

copiedAttributePrefix.description: Optional prefix to add to copied attribute names

copiedAttributeSuffix.description: Optional suffix to add to copied attribute names

listIndexToCopy.description: Index of the list element to copy (0-based)

actions.name: MVTWriter
actions.description: 地物をファイルに書き出す

parameterI18n.title: MVTWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT) format. Generates tiles at /{z}/{x}/{y}.mvt and tilejson.json where the parent directory is treated as HTTP root (tileJSON requires absolute URLs).

colonToUnderscore.title: Colon to Underscore
colonToUnderscore.description: Replace colons in attribute keys (e.g., from XML Namespaces) with underscores

compressOutput.title: Compress Output
compressOutput.description: Optional expression to determine whether to compress the output tiles

layerName.title: Layer Name
layerName.description: Name of the layer within the MVT tiles

maxZoom.title: Maximum Zoom
maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level to generate tiles for

minZoom.title: Minimum Zoom
minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level to generate tiles for

output.title: Output
output.description: Output directory path or expression for the generated MVT tiles

schemaKey.title: Schema Key
schemaKey.description: Attribute key to match data and schema features for attribute filtering and casting. This attribute is excluded from output.

skipUnexposedAttributes.title: Skip Unexposed Attributes
skipUnexposedAttributes.description: Skip attributes with double underscore prefix

parameterI18n.title: NeighborFinder Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for finding spatial neighbors between base and candidate features.

attributePrefix.description: Prefix applied to transferred candidate attributes to avoid collisions.

attributesToTransfer.description: List of candidate attributes to transfer. Empty list means all attributes are transferred.

distanceAttribute.description: Name of the attribute to store the computed distance to the nearest neighbor.

distanceMetric.description: Method used to compute distance between two features.

maxDistance.description: Maximum distance threshold for matching. If None, no distance limit is applied. Units depend on the distanceMetric: native units for Euclidean, meters for Haversine.

mergeStrategy.description: Controls how multiple neighbors are represented on the output.

neighborIndexAttribute.description: Name of the attribute to store the neighbor index (0-based rank) when num_closest > 1 and merge_strategy is "repeatBase". Set to empty string to suppress.

numClosest.description: Number of closest neighbors to find per base feature. Must be >= 1.

euclidean2d.description: 2D Euclidean distance using X and Y coordinates. Z is ignored.

euclidean3d.description: 3D Euclidean distance using X, Y, and Z coordinates.

haversine.description:
Great-circle distance treating X as longitude (degrees) and Y as latitude (degrees). Output is in meters. Intended for WGS-84 inputs.

Note: Distance is computed between representative points (centroids). For accurate results, input features should be relatively small (e.g., buildings, local roads). Large geometries (e.g., countries, large water bodies) may produce inaccurate distances because their centroids may not represent their spatial extent well.

arrayAttributes.description: A single Base feature is emitted; each transferred attribute becomes an ordered array sorted by ascending distance.

closest.description: Only the single closest neighbor is merged onto the Base feature.

repeatBase.description: One output feature is emitted per neighbor. Base attributes are duplicated across all rows, mirroring FME's default multi-neighbor output.

actions.name: NoopProcessor
actions.description: 地物に対して何も処理しない

actions.name: NoopSink
actions.description: 最終的な処理を行わない

parameterI18n.title: NullAttributeMapperParams
parameterI18n.description: NullAttributeMapper parameters

defaultReplacement.description: Fallback replacement for attributes not in mappings (when scope = "all")

routeNullFeatures.description: Emit original features with nulls to hasNull port

attribute.description: Name of the attribute to inspect

onMissing.description: What to do when attribute is missing but not in nullDefinition

replacement.description: Value to write when attribute is null-like null means remove the attribute

missing.description: Attribute key absent from the feature

create.description: Write replacement value, creating the attribute

all.description: Check all attributes on the feature

listed.description: Only check attributes named in mappings

parameterI18n.title: ObjReader Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for reading Wavefront OBJ 3D model files with support for vertices, faces, normals, texture coordinates, and material definitions.

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

includeNormals.title: Include Normals
includeNormals.description: Include vertex normal data in the output geometry

includeTexcoords.title: Include Texture Coordinates
includeTexcoords.description: Include texture coordinate (UV) data in the output geometry

inline.title: Inline Content
inline.description: Expression that returns the file content as text instead of reading from a file path

materialFile.title: Material File
materialFile.description: Expression that returns the path to an external MTL file to use instead of mtllib directives in the OBJ file. When specified, this overrides any material library references in the OBJ file.

mergeGroups.title: Merge Groups
mergeGroups.description: Merge all groups and objects into a single feature instead of creating separate features per group/object

parseMaterials.title: Parse Materials
parseMaterials.description: Enable parsing of material definitions from MTL files referenced in the OBJ file

triangulate.title: Triangulate
triangulate.description: Convert polygons with more than 3 vertices into triangles using fan triangulation

parameterI18n.title: OBJ Writer Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure output settings for writing 3D features to Wavefront OBJ format

output.title: Output Path
output.description: Expression for the output file path where the OBJ file will be written

writeMaterials.title: Write Materials
writeMaterials.description: Enable writing of material (MTL) file alongside the OBJ file

writeNormals.title: Write Normals
writeNormals.description: Include vertex normal vectors in the output

writeTexcoords.title: Write Texture Coordinates
writeTexcoords.description: Include texture coordinate (UV) data in the output (currently not supported - geometry types don't include UV data)

actions.name: Offsetter

offsetZ.title: Z Offset

errorAttribute.title: Error Attribute Name

parameterI18n.title: PLATEAU Destination MeshCode Extractor Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure mesh code extraction for Japanese standard regional mesh

epsgCode.title: EPSG Code

actions.name: PLATEAU4.DomainOfDefinitionValidator
actions.description: PLATEAU4の定義領域を検証する

parameterI18n.title: DomainOfDefinitionValidator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for validating domain of definition of CityGML features.

codelistsPath.description: Fallback codelists directory path expression. When codelists files are not found at the location relative to the GML file, this path will be used as the base directory for resolving codeSpace references.

parameterI18n.title: FaceExtractor Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for validating individual surfaces of WaterBody features. Always checks vertex count, closure, and orientation of polygons in TIN meshes.

parameterI18n.title: FloodingAreaSurfaceGenerator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for generating TIN surfaces from flood area polygons. This processor converts polygons to triangulated surfaces by: 1. Optionally grouping features by an attribute (e.g., udxDirs) 2. Combining all polygons in each group 3. Sampling points along polygon boundaries at regular intervals 4. Optionally adding interior grid points within polygons 5. Performing Delaunay triangulation to create a TIN surface 6. Filtering triangles to keep only those inside the original polygons

groupBy.description: Attribute name to group features by before combining and triangulating. Features with the same value for this attribute will be processed together. If not specified, each feature is processed individually.

pointSpacing.description: Spacing between sampled points in meters (default: 50.0). Points are sampled along polygon boundaries and optionally on an interior grid at this spacing interval.

sampleInterior.description: Enable interior grid sampling (default: false). When enabled, points are added on a regular grid inside the polygon to create a more uniform triangulation. This can be slow for large polygons.

parameterI18n.title: GmlNameCodeSpaceValidator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for validating gml:name elements to ensure they have codeSpace attributes.

cityGmlPath.description: Expression to get the path to the CityGML file

actions.name: PLATEAU4.MaxLodExtractor
actions.description: PLATEAU4の最大詳細レベルを抽出する

parameterI18n.title: MaxLodExtractor Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for extracting maximum LOD (Level of Detail) information from PLATEAU4 CityGML files.

actions.name: PLATEAU4.MissingAttributeDetector

parameterI18n.description: Configuration for extracting object lists from PLATEAU4 data.

parameterI18n.title: CityGmlAttributeInserterParam
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for inserting measurement attributes into CityGML files.

gmlIdAttribute.description: Attribute name on element features holding gml:id (default: "gmlId")

measurements.description: Measurement definitions to insert as gen:measureAttribute elements

outputDir.description: Output directory expression for modified CityGML files

pathAttribute.description: Attribute name on path features holding the file path (default: "path")

sourceEpsg.description: The projected CRS EPSG code used for rasterization (needed for UV computation)

textureImagePath.description: Path to the solar radiation texture PNG (texture insertion skipped if absent)

attribute.description: Feature attribute key holding the numeric value (e.g. "totalSolarRadiation")

name.description: XML name attribute value (e.g. "年間予測日射量")

altitudeAndAzimuth.description: Output as altitude and azimuth angles in degrees

both.description: Output both unit normal vector and altitude/azimuth angles

unitNormalVector.description: Output as unit normal vector (x, y, z) in ENU coordinate system

gmlIdAttribute.description: Attribute name for the GML ID within the list items (default: "gmlId")

listAttribute.description: Attribute name containing the list of overlapping features from AreaOnAreaOverlayer (default: "list")

pairIdAttribute.description: Attribute name to store the pair ID (default: "pair_id")

actions.name: PLATEAU4.UDXFolderExtractor
actions.description: PLATEAU4データからUDXフォルダを抽出する

parameterI18n.title: UDXFolderExtractor Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for extracting UDX folder structure information from PLATEAU4 CityGML paths.

parameterI18n.title: UnsharedEdgeDetector Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure unshared edge detection behavior

groupBy.description: Group By Attributes. When specified, edge detection is performed independently within each group. Features with the same values for these attributes are grouped together.

tolerance.description: Tolerance for edge matching in meters (default: 0.1) Edges within this distance are considered the same edge

actions.name: PlanarityFilter
actions.description: タイプに基づいてジオメトリをフィルタリングする

parameterI18n.title: Planarity Filter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure how to filter features based on geometry planarity

filterType.title: Filter Type
filterType.description: The method to use for planarity detection

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: The threshold value for planarity check. For covariance mode: the maximum allowed smallest eigenvalue of the covariance matrix. For height mode: the maximum allowed convex hull minimum height.

height.description: Uses minimum height of the 3D convex hull

pythonFile.title: Python File
pythonFile.description: Path to a Python script file (supports file://, http://, https://, gs://, etc.)

pythonPath.title: Python Path
pythonPath.description: Path to Python interpreter executable (default: python3)

script.title: Inline Script
script.description: Python script code to execute inline

timeoutSeconds.title: Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum execution time for the Python script in seconds (default: 30)

parameterI18n.title: RayIntersectorParams
parameterI18n.description: RayIntersector Parameters

closestIntersectionOnly.description: When true (default), return only the closest intersection point per ray-geometry pair. When false, return all intersection points.

geomId.description: Expression evaluated on geometry features to extract an ID string. When set, intersection features will include a `geom_id` attribute identifying which geometry was hit.

includeRayOrigin.description: When true (default), include intersections at the ray origin. When false, exclude intersections where t < tolerance.

outputGeometryType.description: Type of geometry to output for intersection results. - "pointOfIntersection" (default): Output a point at the intersection location - "lineSegmentToIntersection": Output a line segment from ray origin to intersection point

pairId.description: Expression that evaluates to a pair ID (int or string) for grouping rays with geometries. Only rays and geometries with matching pairId values are tested against each other.

ray.description: Defines how to extract ray data from feature attributes

tolerance.description: Tolerance for intersection calculations (evaluates to f64). If not specified, a default tolerance is used.

dirX.description: Attribute containing ray direction X component

dirY.description: Attribute containing ray direction Y component

dirZ.description: Attribute containing ray direction Z component

posX.description: Attribute containing ray origin X coordinate

posY.description: Attribute containing ray origin Y coordinate

posZ.description: Attribute containing ray origin Z coordinate

lineSegmentToIntersection.description: Output a line segment from ray origin to intersection point

pointOfIntersection.description: Output a point at the intersection location (default behavior)

actions.name: Refiner
actions.description: ジオメトリを精緻化する

actions.name: RhaiCaller
actions.description: Rhaiスクリプトを呼び出す

parameterI18n.title: RhaiCaller Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for executing Rhai scripts on features with conditional processing.

isTarget.description: Rhai script expression to determine if the feature should be processed (returns boolean)

process.description: Rhai script expression to process and transform the feature when target condition is met

parameterI18n.title: Rotator3D Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure the rotation for a 3D polygon

rotation.title: Rotation
rotation.description: The rotation specification: either from/to vectors or axis-angle

parameterI18n.title: ShapefileReader Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for reading Shapefile archives as geographic features. Expects a ZIP archive containing the required Shapefile components (.shp, .dbf, .shx).

allowEmptyPath.title: Allow Null Path
allowEmptyPath.description: If true, a dataset expression that evaluates to null (Rhai `()`) produces zero features instead of an error. This is useful for optional shapefile inputs where the path may not be configured.

dataset.title: File Path
dataset.description: Expression that returns the path to the input file (e.g., "data.csv" or variable reference)

encoding.title: Character Encoding
encoding.description:
Character encoding for attribute data in the DBF file. If not specified, encoding is determined from the .cpg file (if present), otherwise defaults to UTF-8.

Supported encodings include: - **UTF-8** - Unicode UTF-8 (default, recommended for all new shapefiles) - **Windows Code Pages** - Windows-1250 through Windows-1258, Windows-874 - **ISO-8859 family** - ISO-8859-1 (Latin-1) through ISO-8859-16 - **Asian encodings** - Shift-JIS, EUC-JP, EUC-KR, Big5, GBK, GB18030 - **Other legacy encodings** - KOI8-R, KOI8-U, IBM866, Macintosh

All encoding labels are case-insensitive and support common variations (e.g., "UTF-8", "UTF8", "utf8" all work).

UTF-16 is not supported due to byte-level handling requirements. If a UTF-16 shapefile is encountered, an error with conversion instructions is returned.

Examples: - `"UTF-8"` - Modern standard - `"Windows-1252"` - Common for Western European legacy data - `"ISO-8859-1"` - Latin-1, common in older shapefiles - `"Shift-JIS"` - Japanese data

Priority order: encoding parameter > .cpg file > UTF-8 default

force2d.title: Force 2D
force2d.description: If true, forces all geometries to be 2D (ignoring Z values)

inline.title: Inline Content
inline.description: Expression that returns the file content as text instead of reading from a file path

actions.name: ShapefileWriter
actions.description: シェープファイルに地物を書き込む

parameterI18n.title: ShapefileWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to ESRI Shapefile format.

groupBy.description: Optional attributes to group features by, creating separate files for each group

output.description: Output path or expression for the Shapefile to create

parameterI18n.title: Solid Boundary Validator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure validation parameters for solid boundary geometry

tolerance.title: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Tolerance value for geometry operations (as an expression evaluating to f64). Used for vertex merging and face triangulation.

parameterI18n.title: SpatialFilter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure spatial relationship testing between filter and candidate geometries

mergeFilterAttributes.title: Merge Filter Attributes
mergeFilterAttributes.description: If true, copy attributes from matched filter feature(s) onto the candidate. Only applies to features routed to the passed port. In OR mode (pass_on_multiple_matches: true), only the first matching filter's attributes are merged. In AND mode, attributes from all matched filters are merged in order; if multiple filters share a key, the last filter's value wins.

mergedAttributesPrefix.title: Merged Attributes Prefix
mergedAttributesPrefix.description: Optional prefix applied to merged filter attribute names to avoid collisions. For example, a prefix of "filter_" turns a filter attribute "zone" into "filter_zone".

outputMatchCountAttribute.title: Output Match Count Attribute
outputMatchCountAttribute.description: Optional attribute name to store the number of matching filters

passOnMultipleMatches.title: Pass on Multiple Matches
passOnMultipleMatches.description: If true, pass if ANY filter matches (OR logic). If false, pass only if ALL filters match (AND logic).

predicate.title: Spatial Predicate
predicate.description: The spatial relationship to test between filter and candidate geometries

coveredBy.description: Candidate is covered by filter geometry

touches.description: Geometries touch at boundaries but don't overlap

actions.name: SqlReader
actions.description: SQLデータベースから地物を読み取る

parameterI18n.title: SQL Reader Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure the SQL query and database connection for reading features from a database

sql.title: SQL Query
sql.description: SQL query expression to execute for retrieving data

actions.name: StatisticsCalculator
actions.description: 地物の統計情報を計算する

parameterI18n.title: StatisticsCalculator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for calculating statistical aggregations on feature attributes.

calculations.title: Calculations
calculations.description: List of statistical calculations to perform on grouped features

groupBy.title: Group by
groupBy.description: Attributes to group features by for aggregation. All of the inputs will be grouped if not specified.

groupId.title: Group id
groupId.description: Optional attribute to store the group identifier. The ID will be formed by concatenating the values of the group_by attributes separated by '|'.

actions.name: ThreeDimensionBoxReplacer
actions.description: 3次元ボックスをポリゴンで置き換える

parameterI18n.title: 3D Box Replacer Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure which attributes contain the minimum and maximum coordinates for creating a 3D box

maxX.title: Maximum X Attribute
maxX.description: Name of attribute containing the maximum X coordinate

maxY.title: Maximum Y Attribute
maxY.description: Name of attribute containing the maximum Y coordinate

maxZ.title: Maximum Z Attribute
maxZ.description: Name of attribute containing the maximum Z coordinate

minX.title: Minimum X Attribute
minX.description: Name of attribute containing the minimum X coordinate

minY.title: Minimum Y Attribute
minY.description: Name of attribute containing the minimum Y coordinate

minZ.title: Minimum Z Attribute
minZ.description: Name of attribute containing the minimum Z coordinate

parameterI18n.title: ThreeDimensionForcer Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure how to convert 2D geometries to 3D by adding Z-coordinates

elevation.title: Elevation
elevation.description: The Z-coordinate (elevation) value to add to all points. Can be a constant value or an expression. Defaults to 0.0 if not specified.

preserveExistingZ.title: Preserve Existing Z Values
preserveExistingZ.description: If true, geometries that are already 3D will pass through unchanged. If false, existing Z values will be replaced with the specified elevation. Defaults to false.

actions.name: ThreeDimensionPlanarityRotator
actions.description: 3Dで平面を回転させる

actions.name: ThreeDimensionRotator
actions.description: 3次元ボックスをポリゴンで置き換える

parameterI18n.title: 3D Rotator Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure the 3D rotation parameters including axis, origin point, and angle

angleDegree.title: Angle in Degrees
angleDegree.description: Rotation angle in degrees around the specified axis

directionX.title: Direction X
directionX.description: X component of the rotation axis direction vector

directionY.title: Direction Y
directionY.description: Y component of the rotation axis direction vector

directionZ.title: Direction Z
directionZ.description: Z component of the rotation axis direction vector

originX.title: Origin X
originX.description: X coordinate of the rotation origin point

originY.title: Origin Y
originY.description: Y coordinate of the rotation origin point

originZ.title: Origin Z
originZ.description: Z coordinate of the rotation origin point

actions.name: TwoDimensionForcer
actions.description: ジオメトリを2次元に強制する

parameterI18n.title: Vertex Counter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure where to store the count of vertices found in geometries

outputAttribute.title: Output Attribute
outputAttribute.description: Name of the attribute where the vertex count will be stored as a number

actions.name: VertexRemover
actions.description: 地物のジオメトリから特定の頂点を削除する

actions.name: VerticalReprojector
actions.description: 地物のジオメトリを指定された座標系に垂直再投影する

parameterI18n.title: Vertical Reprojector Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configure the type of vertical datum conversion to apply

reprojectorType.title: Reprojector Type
reprojectorType.description: The type of vertical coordinate transformation to apply

actions.name: XMLFragmenter
actions.description: XMLを分割する

parameterI18n.title: XMLFragmenter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for fragmenting XML documents into smaller pieces.

actions.name: XMLValidator

parameterI18n.title: XmlWriter Parameters
parameterI18n.description: Configuration for writing features to XML files.

output.description: Output path or expression for the XML file to create
